name: Samuel Mwangi
bio: With over 15 years in real estate, Samuel founded PrimePlot Realty to make land investment transparent and accessible.

name: Esther Achieng
bio: Esther leads title verification and ensures every transaction meets the highest legal standards.

name: James Kariuki
bio: James helps clients identify high-growth plots aligned with their long-term financial goals.

name: Linda Cherono
bio: Linda ensures every client receives prompt, personalized support from inquiry through to ownership.
